# Extração: JLD-Scaling-Checklist

- **Fonte:** JLD-Scaling-Checklist.pdf
- **Tipo:** PDF
- **Páginas:** 0
- **Tamanho:** 0.12 MB

---

SCALING CHECKLIST
PHASE 1
✓ Decide where you want to begin scaling (top funnel, middle, or bottom funnel). Choose one first to test.
✓ Plan for horizontal scaling, laying out differentiated value propositions as people move down the funnel.
✓ Complete your financial calculations, so as you scale you have more room in your acceptable CPA / CPL
ranges.
✓ Launch a Dynamic Product Ad or Website Custom Audience general remarketing campaign, depending
on which one currently exists. (Try offering free shipping or another discount alongside the exact product
viewed and also static creative showing off other products/collections/offers/selling points, etc.)
✓ Introduce 1-2 new prospecting audiences, checking the Audience Overlap. You may want to test
targeting Instagram on its own, separating it at the Ad Set level. Consider the strength of the signals when
creating lookalike prospecting audiences. Some ideas are 1% VIP Customers Last Two Years, 1%
Purchasers,
1% Add to Carts, 1% 2X Page View, or 1% Converted Leads (b2b).
✓ Create separate 3, 7, and 30 day remarketing windows, utilizing Website Custom Audiences or Dynamic
Product Ads.
✓ Be sure you have enough product inventory!
✓ Check your account budget cap. As you approach $750/day, contact Facebook.
✓ Rename all campaigns, ad sets, and ads with new naming conventions.
PHASE 2
✓ Introduce Page Post Engagement Objective in BOFU.
✓ Try introducing some photo posts or link posts for social proofing using Page Post Engagement
objective in top of the funnel, transferring to conversion objective after 72 hours.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

✓ Consolidate prospecting audiences to get through the Learning Phase faster. (Or at least get close to!)
✓ Introduce Video View objective in TOFU with :30 video, then create Audience of 25% video view to
remarket to.
✓ Experiment with optimizing for a higher pixel event at the ad set level.
PHASE 3
✓ Launch a 1% lookalike of 2X Purchasers.
✓ Launch a 2% or greater lookalike of Purchasers. Can try targeting men vs. women differently as well.
✓ Launch specific interest targets separated out by ad set.
✓ Launch a wide, no targeting audience, experimenting with “Value” optimization.
✓ Launch Broad Match DPA.
✓ Create 7, 14, 30, 90 day DPA windows and launch ads with different copies to those audiences. (Pro-tip:
use positive press, reviews/testimonials, promotions on the different DPA windows.)
✓ Launch two landing page tests, testing between best sellers and certain collections pages.
✓ Experiment with split testing BOFU and placements, focusing on Instagram separation.
✓ Experiment with bidding windows.
✓ Utilize a post for social proofing with your fans, asking for feedback on that post from them. Ask them to
take photos of them wearing/using the product and post it on the comment thread of that ad.
PHASE 4
✓ Experiment with manual override bidding, trying 3-5X your CPA goal.
✓ Launch DPA cross-sells and upsells based on product categories.
✓ Build out framework of automated rules.
✓ Expand into new geographies, such as UK, Germany, and Australia.
✓ Experiment with iOS / Android device-level splitting.
✓ When you notice Ad Set performance declining, pause it, duplicate it, and start it again.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
